name: Bakuchi
usesInAyurveda: Tridoshic Modulation: Pacifies Kapha and Vata.
mainMedicinalUses: The primary herb for Vitiligo (Leucoderma) and psoriasis.
Used for hair growth and scalp health.
plantProfile: Often called 'Babchi' oil in modern skincare.
preparationMethods: Topical oil application followed by sunlight (sun exposure).
safetyProfile: Can cause skin irritation; always dilute. Consult professional.
